name: Parcel Problems
short_description: ‚Äã‚ÄãParcel Problems‚Äã is a fast-paced parcel packing simulator. You must cram items into boxes as fast as you can in the hopes that you‚Äôre making your quota. Don't let your boss down!
detailed_description:
Your boss‚Äôs words were clear, ‚ÄúIf we don‚Äôt have a package leaving this building every ten seconds, I‚Äôm going to have to make some changes around here‚Äú. This was quite a time crunch, but you can‚Äôt afford to lose your job.

You can do it‚Ä¶ Right?

‚Äã‚ÄãParcel Problems‚Äã is a fast paced warehouse parcel packing simulator. You must cram items into boxes with the clock breathing down your neck in the hopes that you‚Äôre making your 10 second quota. You could cut corners and forget items just to get that quota met, but every second that ticks is making packing tougher and you can feel your heart in your chest beating harder with every slip-up.



Fold, Pack, Tape, Label. Fold, Pack, Tape, Label.... How long can you last?

This game was initially created for the Ludum Dare 51 game jam with the theme: "Every 10 Seconds"
